prediction.reasoning: Based on ISRG's historical volatility of approximately 2-3% daily, I used a random walk model with normal distribution. The point estimate assumes no directional bias over 2 days. Daily volatility of ~2.2% translates to ~3.1% over 2 days (sqrt of time scaling). Confidence intervals are constructed using standard normal quantiles applied to the volatility-adjusted price distribution.
